parameters.text:
📊 *Анализ {{ $json.symbol }}*

🕐 Timeframe: 1m / 5m / 1h
💰 Цена: ${{ $json.ticker.lastPrice || 'N/A' }}

*Анализ:*
• 1m: {{ $json.analysis.1m.direction }} ({{ $json.analysis.1m.score }}pts, RSI {{ $json.analysis.1m.rsi }})
• 5m: {{ $json.analysis.5m.direction }} ({{ $json.analysis.5m.score }}pts, RSI {{ $json.analysis.5m.rsi }})
• 1h: {{ $json.analysis.1h.direction }} ({{ $json.analysis.1h.score }}pts, RSI {{ $json.analysis.1h.rsi }})

📊 Стакан: {{ $json.orderBook.direction }}
💹 Спред: {{ $json.orderBook.spreadPct }}%

*Итог:*
🎯 Направление: *{{ $json.final.direction }}*
📈 Уверенность: *{{ $json.final.confidence }}%*
🤖 AI: {{ $json.aiRecommendation }}

{{ $json.riskManagement.recommendedAction }}
